test.name: Find possible duplicate tree persons using person_person_matches
test.description: User invokes tree-edit to check for possible duplicate tree persons for Patrick Flynn (LZNY-BRF) before merging. Tests that tree-edit calls person_person_matches, surfaces the one pending duplicate candidate, and advises the user to confirm identity via proof-conclusion before merging.

input.user_message: tree-edit: Check for possible duplicate persons for Patrick Flynn (FamilySearch ID LZNY-BRF). Are there any merge candidates in the tree I should know about?

judge_context: Should call person_person_matches with id LZNY-BRF
Should report the one pending duplicate candidate (LZNY-QRS, confidence 3, score 0.71)
Should advise the user to confirm identity via proof-conclusion before merging — never merge on this tool's output alone
Should NOT make any edits to tree.gedcomx.json or research.json — this is a read-only duplicate check
